results.description: DESCRIPTION:PER YOUR APPLICATION REQUEST DATED JULY 16, 2021, THIS GRANT AGREEMENT IS BEING AWARD FEDERAL FUNDING IN THE AMOUNT OF $24,999 TO THE UNIVERSITY OF MASSACHUSETTS CRANBERRY STATION. THESE FUNDS WILL ASSIST IN SUPPORTING THE INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT (IPM) PROJECT LED BY THE UMASS CRANBERRY STATION THAT WILL EXAMINE CURRENT CRANBERRY GROWER PRACTICES TO PROMOTE TECHNIQUES THAT WILL MINIMIZE APPLICATOR EXPOSURE FROM OFF-TARGET DRIFT OR SPLASH FROM THE APPLICATION OF HERBICIDES IN CRANBERRY PRODUCTION. IN CONCERT WITH INDUSTRY PARTNERS, THIS PROJECT WILL SUPPORT FIELD WORK AND SAMPLING EFFORTS TO IMPROVE UNDERSTANDING OF RANGE OF RESIDUES (FRUIT OR LEAF TISSUES) THAT COULD OCCUR FROM POS EMERGENCE APPLICATIONS OF HERBICIDES.ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.
